_comment: MPBT Solaris RE symbol dictionary. Maps canonical names to their Ghidra-default binary identifiers. Apply canonical names in Ghidra via Edit → Rename Symbol to make cross-references readable.

Aries_RecvDispatch.role: Main recv loop; switch on ARIES packet type

Aries_PacketAlloc.role: Allocates outgoing packet; writes type + 12-byte header

Aries_PacketSetLen.role: Finalises header: fills payload_length field at offset 8

Aries_PacketParse.role: Recv-side parser: validates 12-byte header, extracts type + payload

Aries_Connect.role: Opens new TCP connection to addr (called on REDIRECT)

Aries_RawWrite.role: Sends raw bytes on active socket

g_aries_GameWorldConn.role: Pointer to secondary/game-world connection object; set after REDIRECT

g_aries_LoginBuf.role: Outgoing LOGIN packet data buffer (layout confirmed from Set*() exports)

Frame_VerifyCRC.role: 19-bit LFSR CRC validator for server→client inner frames

Frame_EncodeArg.role: Base-85 arg encoder: Frame_EncodeArg(n, value) emits n+1 bytes

Frame_DecodeArg.role: Base-85 arg decoder, symmetric to Frame_EncodeArg

Frame_ReadByte.role: Read one encoded byte from parse buffer: returns *ptr++ - 0x21

Frame_WriteCmdByte.role: Write command byte to send buffer: *ptr++ = param + 0x21

Frame_CopyString.role: Calls Frame_ReadString then null-terminates destination buffer

Lobby_RecvDispatch.role: Inner frame processor; calls seq pre-handler + g_lobby_DispatchTable

Lobby_SeqHandler.role: Seq-byte pre-handler; ACK path if decoded val > 42

Lobby_WelcomeGate.role: Accumulates recv bytes; strcmp to g_lobby_WelcomeStrMMW to unlock game loop

Lobby_OnWelcomeA.role: Called after welcome gate passes (path A — lobby UI init)

Lobby_OnWelcomeB.role: Called after welcome gate passes (path B)

Cmd3_Thunk.role: Dispatch table entry for cmd 3; calls Cmd3_SendCapabilities

Cmd7_ParseMenuDialog.role: Parses server cmd 7 menu dialog payload; renders numbered choice list

Cmd7_OnMenuPick.role: User picks menu item; sends Cmd7_SendReply(listId, item_data[k-1]+1)

Cmd7_OnMenuEsc.role: User presses ESC in menu; calls Cmd1d_Send

Cmd7_SendReply.role: Send client cmd 7 reply: startCmd('\a') + type1(listId) + type4(val)

Cmd1d_Send.role: Send cmd 0x1d cancel frame: byte(p1) + type1(p2) + type4(p3)

Cmd20_Thunk.role: Dispatch table entry for cmd 20; jumps to Cmd20_MouseHandler

Cmd20_MouseHandler.role: Cursor/mouse position handler for cmd 20 messages

Cmd26_ParseMechList.role: Parse cmd 26 mech list payload; populate g_cmd26_* arrays

MechWin_Create.role: Create 640×480 mech selection window; set graphics mode 0x13

MechWin_HighlightSlot.role: Highlight a mech row in selection window

MechWin_LookupMechName.role: Return mech name string from mech ID

MecFile_Load.role: Open mechdata\<name>.MEC, XOR-decrypt 552 bytes into param_1 struct, apply speed *2/3 post-transform

MecFile_Decrypt.role: XOR decrypt loop: 549 iters, advance-by-1 overlapping 32-bit PRNG XOR; param_2=byte_count

MecFile_Prng.role: PRNG step: uvar1=(state*0xF0F1+1); new_state=uvar1+rotl16(uvar1); returns new_state in EAX

MecFile_GetSeedId.role: Derive XOR seed from filename: last 4 chars before '.' in reverse order as LE uint32; stores to DAT_00479980

MecFile_GetStructPerSection.role: Return IS or armor for a body section (0-7) from tonnage lookup; case 7 returns 9 (head)

MecFile_BuildDisplayData.role: Fill mech display struct: copies 11 uint16 armor/speed fields from .MEC at 0x1A-0x2E, zero weapon slots, build ammo table

Map_LoadFile.role: Load IS.MAP / SOLARIS.MAP leading room table; count-prefixed variable records become fixed 0x1a-byte records, then trailing bytes go to Picture_ReadFromFile

Map_InitSpace.role: Load IS.MAP or SOLARIS.MAP depending on DAT_00472a54; builds sorted non-Solaris global room pointer list from IS.MAP

MapRecordCompareByFlags.role: qsort comparator for map record pointers: compare low flag byte at record+2, then case-insensitive room name at record+0x12

MapOpenInnerSphere.role: Server cmd 40 handler: reads context id, current room id, and value/cost, then opens the Inner Sphere map UI

MapOpenSolaris.role: Server cmd 43 handler: reads context id, current room id+1, and 26 Solaris counters, then opens the Solaris map UI

MapLocationListKeyHandler.role: Keyboard handler for the same-group map location list opened from the map UI

Map_SendTravelReply.role: Client cmd 10 sender: type1(contextId) + type4(selection); selection is selectedRoomId+1 or 0 for cancel

WorldScene_SendAction.role: Client cmd 5 sender for main scene action buttons: byte(actionType); Cmd4 option buttons pass their server-supplied type here

WorldScene_OptionHandler.role: Main scene action-button handler: Cmd4 option ids 0x100..0x105 send cmd 5 with the server-supplied option type

WorldScene_MouseHandler.role: Main scene mouse-selection handler; fixed scene button offset 4 also sends cmd 5 action 4

WorldScene_KeyHandler.role: Main scene keyboard/button handler; button id 1 sends cmd 5 action 4, id 0x131 opens Options

WorldScene_LocationAction.role: Main scene location-icon handler; sends client cmd 23 with one byte selecting one of four location slots

Picture_ReadFromFile.role: Read generic picture/resource blob after the map room table

g_lobby_SeqHandlerPtr.role: Points to Lobby_SeqHandler; installed as pre-handler in Lobby_RecvDispatch

g_lobby_LastSeq.role: Stores most recently received client seq value (0–42)

g_lobby_WelcomeGateOpen.role: Set to 1 by Lobby_WelcomeGate when welcome string matches; unlocks main loop

g_lobby_WelcomeStrMMW.role: Literal: "\x1b?MMW Copyright Kesmai Corp. 1991" (normal Windows login path)

g_cmd7_ListIdTable.role: Per-list-id callback/state array; index [0x512] used by menu dialog

g_cmd26_TypeFlag.role: Set by Cmd26_ParseMechList to received typeFlag value

g_cmd26_MechIdArr.role: mech_id values array, indexed by entry i

g_cmd26_MechTypeArr.role: mech_type values array, indexed by entry i

g_cmd26_SlotArr.role: slot values array, indexed by entry i (primary copy)

g_cmd26_SlotArrAlt.role: slot values array, indexed by entry i (alternate copy)

g_cmd26_TypeStrArr.role: type_string array (e.g. "SDR-5V"), indexed by entry i

g_cmd26_VariantArr.role: variant string array (e.g. "Spider"), indexed by entry i

g_cmd26_NameArr.role: pilot name array; empty string triggers MechWin_LookupMechName fallback

g_mechWin_ShowExtButtons.role: Non-zero when typeFlag triggers extended button display

g_mechWin_HighlightIdx.role: Index of currently highlighted mech slot
